title: The Complete Mediterranean Cookbook
author: America's Test Kitchen
cuisine: mediterranean (entire book) - a loved cuisine; strong, reliable source (ATK kitchen-tested)
note: Catalog built from chapter recipe-list pages (titles + page numbers). To add any as a real cookwhat recipe, scan the full recipe page for the ingredient list + method. PARTIAL: covers Rice & Grains (ch.4), Pasta & Couscous (ch.5), Vegetables (ch.7), Poultry/Pork/Lamb/Beef, Spice Blends & Pastes, Seafood (ch.8), Eggs (ch.10), Breads/Flatbreads/Pizzas (ch.11), and Fruit & Sweets (ch.12). Still pending: mezze/starters, soups, salads, beans (early chapters). NOTE: the Vegetables chapter was transcribed from a lower-resolution photo, so a few of its titles/pages are best-effort - re-scan that chapter to verify. A few lamb page numbers are also best-effort.
source_format: Source for any meal cataloged from this book: "The Complete Mediterranean Cookbook (ATK) - p.NNN" (no URL).
dislikeFlags: Broccoli and Feta Frittata flagged (broccoli). White-bean/chickpea mains flagged (keep beans low). No curry dishes.
